channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tata Tiago proves itself as a practical and stylish budget hatchback in South Africa
item.description: After Tata’s more premium models left a mixed impression in South Africa, the entry-level Tata Tiago impresses with its practicality, style, and fuel efficiency. The Tiago’s modern exterior features L...

item.title: Nigeria and US Kill 175 ISWAP Fighters in Joint Airstrikes
item.description: Naija and US forces don carry out serious airstrikes for Naija northeast wey don result in the death of 175 Islamic State militants, including key leaders of ISWAP. According to Defence Headquarters, ...

item.title: LIRR Strike Continues as Commuters Adjust to Limited Service
item.description: The Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) strike entered its third day, leaving New York City commuters scrambling to find alternative ways to reach work. Thousands of union workers returned to picket lines Mo...

item.title: GSIS Requests NBI Assistance for Additional Security Instead of PNP
item.description: The Government Service Insurance System (GSIS) has requested additional security assistance from the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) rather than the Philippine National Police (PNP). This decis...

item.title: Montreal City Workers Save 14 Ducklings from a Sewer
item.description: In Montreal, city workers came to the rescue of 14 ducklings that had fallen into a sewer, safely guiding them back to their natural habitat. The incident occurred when the ducklings, likely following...

item.title: Trump and Xi Discuss Trade and Relations, Limited Agreements Reached
item.description: President Donald Trump concluded a two-day summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping in Beijing on May 15, 2026. Both leaders described the meeting positively, with Trump calling it 'incredible' and Xi fr...

item.title: Terrorists Using Cosmetic Procedures to Alter Identity in India
item.description: In recent investigations, Indian authorities have uncovered instances where terrorists prioritised cosmetic procedures over their operational missions. Lashkar-e-Taiba operative Usman Jutt, who had in...

item.title: Georgia Judge Orders Full Access for Election Observers During Primary Results Tabulation
item.description: A Fulton County judge in Georgia has issued a temporary restraining order requiring the Secretary of State's office to grant poll watchers and State Election Board observers access to monitor the tabu...

item.title: Investors Challenge Treasury on Capital Gains Tax Changes
item.description: Investors have publicly criticised Treasurer Jim Chalmers over proposed changes to the capital gains tax (CGT), arguing that applying new rules to all asset types could unfairly penalise higher-risk i...

item.title: Low salaries limit African scientists and hinder local biodiversity research
item.description: Africa get plenti biodiversity but plenty of am never properly studied. Researchers wey dey based for Africa dey produce less than 1% of the world scientific output. One main reason na say governments...

item.title: Arsenal Secures First Premier League Title in 22 Years After Bournemouth Draws with Man City
item.description: On 19th May 2026, Arsenal finally ended a 22-year wait to lift the Premier League trophy after Bournemouth held Manchester City to a 1-1 draw at the Vitality Stadium. Young sensation Eli Junior Kroupi...

item.title: Greenland Officials and Residents Reject U.S. Diplomatic Visit and Proposals
item.description: Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry's recent visit to Nuuk, Greenland, intended to strengthen U.S.-Greenland relations, was met with widespread hostility from locals and government officials. Landry arrive...

item.title: Xi Jinping to host Vladimir Putin in Beijing following recent Trump visit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping is expected to host Russian President Vladimir Putin in Beijing this week, in a high-level diplomatic meeting taking place shortly after a recent visit by former US Presid...

item.title: Quebec and Newfoundland and Labrador Continue Negotiations on Churchill Falls Agreement
item.description: Quebec and Newfoundland and Labrador officials remain optimistic about reaching a mutually beneficial agreement regarding the Churchill Falls hydroelectric project. A recent report by a Newfoundland a...

item.title: Philippines rejects US diplomatic immunity request for New Clark City AI hub
item.description: The Philippines has rejected the United States’ request to grant diplomatic immunity for American personnel involved in the upcoming Artificial Intelligence (AI) hub in New Clark City, Tarlac. The AI ...

item.title: Negi Returns to Kapamilya Deal or No Deal Season 6 with Greater Confidence
item.description: Popular personality Negi made her second appearance on the hit ABS-CBN game show 'Kapamilya Deal or No Deal' hosted by Luis Manzano. This time around, she showed more confidence as she faced off again...

item.title: WHO declares global alert on Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak in Central Africa
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared a Public Health Emergency of International Concern over the Ebola outbreak in central Africa, acting faster than usual by not waiting for the advice of...

item.title: Arsenal Clinch Premier League Title After Manchester City Draw Confirms Victory
item.description: Arsenal have officially emerged as champions of the English Premier League, ending a 22-year wait for the title. Their triumph was confirmed following a 1-1 draw between Manchester City and Bournemout...

item.title: Stephen Colbert’s Lasting Influence on American Political Satire
item.description: Stephen Colbert’s career, spanning his roles on 'The Daily Show,' 'The Colbert Report,' and 'The Late Show,' has significantly shaped American political satire. Unlike many satirists who merely commen...

item.title: Katie Price shares final messages from missing husband Lee Andrews as family seeks his safe return
item.description: Lee Andrews, husband of former glamour model Katie Price, has been reported missing in Dubai, prompting public concern from both his wife and his mother. The couple last communicated via text early on...
